agent_description: Autonomous agent that discovers citizen journalism recordings on Filecoin FVM, runs SigLIP similarity analysis to find corroborating footage, bundles matched recordings on-chain, and updates ERC-8004 reputation scores. Operates without human intervention after deployment.
decision_loop: discover: fetch unprocessed recordings from Filecoin FVM contract
plan: group by GPS cluster, identify candidates with ≥2 recordings
execute: run SigLIP embeddings + cosine similarity via HuggingFace
commit: update corroboration bundle on Filecoin FVM
reputation: record task success/failure in ERC-8004 registry
log: append structured entry to agent_log.json and store on Filecoin via Synapse SDK
safety_guardrails: never writes to contract without similarity threshold verification
catches and logs all errors before retrying
records failures in ERC-8004 reputation registry for auditability
does not process recordings without Storacha CID (upload not complete)
